name: atlas-method
description: A lean-by-design documentation methodology for running a personal operating system on Claude Code.

fileClasses.CANONICAL: Methodology core. Travels as-is into a user's instance and is updated from upstream. Do not hand-edit locally.
fileClasses.SCAFFOLD: Templates a user copies once and then fills in. Owned by the user after instantiation; never updated from upstream.
fileClasses.LOCAL-ONLY: Generated inside a user's instance and never present in this source repo (listed here for completeness).

files.purpose: Repo landing page and methodology overview.
MIT license.
Literal public version string.
Version-specific overview: what ships, what is deferred.
Release notes and two-track version mapping.
This file. Version, file inventory, and per-file class.
Bootstrap script that scaffolds a fresh instance from the skeleton.
The methodology specification.
Agent delegation tiers and discipline rules.
Documentation protocol: how trees grow, split, and are named.
Reference for the hook system and agent-prelude injection.
The /atlas self-audit command definition.
Pre-read hook.
Injects the agent prelude into spawned agents.
Universal agent rules injected into every dispatch.
Safety prohibitions injected into every dispatch.
Playbook for verifying before changing fragile state.
Playbook for extracting a leaf doc from a growing trunk.
The soil template: behavioural rules a user fills in for their own system.
Trunk template: a domain's reference doc.
Queue template: a domain's active work.
Handoff template: session-to-session message.
Ideas template: a domain's parking lot.
Worked example trunk for an illustrative Reading domain.
Worked example queue.
Worked example handoff.
Worked example ideas parking lot.
PostToolUse hook: auto-replaces em-dashes (U+2014) with " - " in any Write/Edit/MultiEdit file write.
UserPromptSubmit hook: every Nth turn, nudges Claude to refresh the working scratchpad (non-blocking).
Stop hook: when wrap intent is detected, warns if the repo has uncommitted changes or unpushed commits.
PostToolUse:Task hook: verifies agent-claimed output files exist with non-trivial content, warns on misses.
Hook system reference: event/matcher/env vars/settings.json wiring for the v1.1.0 hooks.
The /newbot slash command: interactive flow that scaffolds a new domain from one of seven archetypes.
Full protocol behind /newbot: archetype taxonomy, scaffold details, root-file updates, verification, pitfalls.
Single-purpose archetype trunk template - durable reference doc with {DOMAIN} placeholders.
Single-purpose archetype queue template - active work with {DOMAIN} placeholders.
Single-purpose archetype slash command template - read list, opener, wrap pointer with {DOMAIN} and {SLASH_NAME} placeholders. Renamed by /newbot to commands/{SLASH_NAME}.md.
Job-search archetype trunk template - hunt strategy, target market, pipeline conventions, leaf index with {DOMAIN} placeholders.
Job-search archetype queue template - hunt-level active work with funnel snapshot and pointers to applications + leaves.
Job-search archetype handoff template - session-to-session bridge with what was done, in flight, blocked, and pipeline snapshot.
Job-search archetype applications template - live pipeline dashboard with one table per stage (leads, applied, screening, interviewing, offers, closed).
Job-search archetype career template - positioning, through-line, voice, resume variants, talking points, recurring application facts, network roster.
Job-search archetype per-opportunity leaf template - copied per company to {DOMAIN}-{COMPANY}-OPPORTUNITY.md. Holds role snapshot, contacts, interview log, materials, decision factors, outcome.

Job-search archetype slash command template - read list (queue + applications + handoff always; trunk + career on demand; opportunity leaves on company-name trigger), session modes, wrap specifics. Renamed by /newbot to commands/{SLASH_NAME}.md.
Business archetype trunk template - brand, ICP pointer, offer surface, channels, conventions with {DOMAIN} placeholders.
Business archetype queue template - Quick Resume, Pipeline, Active Campaigns, This Session with {DOMAIN} placeholders.
Business archetype handoff template - session-to-session message with Latest block and prior session log.
Business archetype ideal customer profile template - primary segment, pain points, jobs-to-be-done, qualifiers, disqualifiers, voice.
Business archetype slash command template - read list, mode-based workstream leaf loading, opener with {DOMAIN} and {SLASH_NAME} placeholders.
Business archetype per-workstream leaf template - operating cadence, playbooks, assets, metrics, decisions with {DOMAIN} and {WORKSTREAM} placeholders.
Game archetype trunk template - reference doc with branch-file map and {DOMAIN} placeholders. For MMO / RPG / long-running game trackers.
Game archetype status template - current character / account state: level, gear, location, active threads.
Game archetype goals template - long-term targets and short-term sub-goals with progress tracking.
Game archetype collection template - items, achievements, kill logs, wishlist tracking.
Game archetype knowledge template - mechanics, builds, encounter notes, market reasoning reference.
Game archetype handoff template - between-session continuity for play and planning sessions.
Game archetype slash command template - read list with always-on STATUS+HANDOFF, on-demand branches, common session shapes. Renamed by /newbot to commands/{SLASH_NAME}.md.
Game archetype log template - rotated history from Recently Completed when it grows past five. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_LOG.md.
Business archetype log template - rotated history from Recently Completed when it grows past five. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_LOG.md.

Companion archetype personality template - voice lock with identity, tone, banned phrases, speech patterns, and five voice anchors. Append-only after first real session. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_PERSONALITY.md.
Companion archetype status template - living state of the user (mode, active threads, recent decisions, what NOT to bring up). Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_STATUS.md.
Companion archetype queue template - lighter than operational queue, holds session intent + active threads + follow-ups. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_QUEUE.md.
Companion archetype handoff template - what we talked about, what landed, what is being held, voice notes, for next session. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_HANDOFF.md.
Companion archetype trunk template - durable structure with file map, voice-lock pointer, session flow, conventions, leaf index. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}.md.
Companion archetype log template - rotated history from Recently Completed when it grows past five. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_LOG.md.
Companion archetype slash command template - persona-led session opener, voice discipline, verbatim protocol pointer, wrap protocol. Renamed by /newbot to commands/{SLASH_NAME}.md.
Learning-system archetype trunk template - durable reference doc for a topic-progression learning effort with {DOMAIN} placeholders. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}.md.
Learning-system archetype curriculum template - holds the full topic map, reading list, and module structure. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_TOPIC.md.
Learning-system archetype coursework template - per-lesson and per-exercise tracking. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_COURSEWORK.md.
Learning-system archetype progress log template - running session log of what has been covered and what is next. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_PROGRESS.md.
Learning-system archetype queue template - active sessions and immediate next actions. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_QUEUE.md.
Learning-system archetype log template - rotated history from Recently Completed when it grows past five. Renamed by /newbot to {DOMAIN}_LOG.md.
Learning-system archetype slash command template - read list, study session shape, wrap pointer with {DOMAIN} and {SLASH_NAME} placeholders. Renamed by /newbot to commands/{SLASH_NAME}.md.
Bot-product archetype trunk template - reference doc for a live operational system with architecture-at-a-glance, key references, operating cadence.
Bot-product archetype queue template - active work with deploy-state Quick Resume and Incidents section.
Bot-product archetype handoff template - session-to-session continuity with shipped/in-flight/blocked split and ops-state notes.
Bot-product archetype product spec template - features, users, surfaces, config, data model, roadmap, non-goals. The WHAT side.
Bot-product archetype ops template - deploy target, runtime config, dependencies, monitoring, operational tasks, backup/recovery, postmortems. The HOW side.
Bot-product archetype slash command template - mode-aware read list (QUEUE/HANDOFF always, SPEC/OPS on demand) and ops-priority opener.

localOnly: CLAUDE.md (instantiated from skeleton in a user's instance)
{DOMAIN}.md and its branches (instantiated per domain by the user)
